transcript.text: Hello, Living in Boulder Vlog for the 10th of January 2014.

Well, actually I have been up all night. I've been up all night.
But I've been in bed, lying down.
Because I...
And yesterday I didn't work all day. I slept all day.
I worked until like 10 in the morning, I think.
Something like that, yesterday.
And then I...
And then I went to bed, and I was sleeping until like...
Dark, dark. Until like 8 or something.
And then I got up, and I had like a meal.
And then I laid back in bed, and I was just laying there.
I didn't actually catch any Z's.
But I think I'll be...
I think I'm good to go for the day.
And be diurnalist, and be up all day.
And then not get to sleep until tonight when it's dark.
Because I had to rig it like this.
Because my cousin's coming into town, wants to watch the National...
Cyclocross Championship.
Which since I'll...

And it'd be good to go outside anyway.
I haven't been outside for like 5, 6 days.
Which is good. I like that.
Because it means I'm not spending money.
And it's a really empowering feeling to not...
To just stay busy and stay inside.
Not spending anything, dude.
It's fucking awesome. I love it.
So...
But yeah, it'll be cool to go outside.

Because my body would never actually wake up.
So...
I need to...
Pretty sure...
I need to...
